description: The GrabReferenceSet can be used to write a reference to a field on grab and release.

fields.Target: The field in which to change on grab and release.
fields.GrabbedTarget: The value to set the contained data of the SyncRef referenced in ``Target`` when the item is grabbed.
fields.ReleasedTarget: The value to set the contained data of the SyncRef referenced in ``Target`` when the item is released.
fields.SetOnGrabbed: Whether to set the contained data of the SyncRef referenced in ``Target`` when the item is grabbed.
fields.SetOnReleased: Whether to set the contained data of the SyncRef referenced in ``Target`` when the item is released.

usage: While on the same slot as a Grabbable the component can be configured to set a reference on grabbed and on released.
